text: DrJill: Hello, I'm Dr.
DrJill: Jill, and welcome to Let's Learn English with Anna.
DrJill: A playground is an outdoor place.
DrJill: We play and have fun at a playground.
DrJill: They are great places for exercise.
DrJill: What do you do at a playground?
DrJill: Let's visit Anna.
DrJill: She helps us answer this question.
DrJill: What do you do at a playground?
Anna: Hi, welcome!
Anna: Hi Max!
Max: Hello, Anna!
Max: I have our question for today.
Anna: Great!
Anna: What do you do at a playground?
Anna: I can do lots of things at a playground.
Max: Baana, playgrounds are for kids.
Anna: That is true, but everyone can have fun at a playground.
DrJill: There are many ways to play at a playground.
DrJill: You can climb, swing, slide
DrJill: Run or play games like soccer or basketball.
DrJill: Now let's hear from some friends
DrJill: They talk about fun things to do at a playground.
Max: My favorite playground has a skateboard park
DrJill: At the playground, I hang upside down from the monkey bars.
DrJill: My favorite playground has a soccer field.
DrJill: Thanks friends!
DrJill: Let's talk about those action words.
DrJill: You know?
DrJill: Verbs.
DrJill: When we finish some actions, we add an ED to the end.
DrJill: For example, I am dancing.
DrJill: I am done.
DrJill: I danced
DrJill: Next, Anna plays a game at a playground.
DrJill: She gets a list of actions and how to do them.
DrJill: To win, she needs to do the actions in order.
DrJill: Now let's join Anna.
DrJill: Listen for words like around, under, up
DrJill: Through and between.
DrJill: Also listen for words ending in E B.
Anna: Max, Daisy, we are at the playground.
Anna: We are ready to play.
Anna: Max and Daisy are watching from home.
Anna: Felix, you read the actions.
Students: First, walk around the dragonfly.
Students: Second, crawl under the slide.
Students: Third, climb up the tree.
Students: Fourth, crawl through
Students: a log and fifth cross the finish line between the trees.
Students: On your mark get set, go
Max: Anna is walking around the dragonfly.
Max: She is rolling under the slide.
Max: Now she is climbing up the tree.
Max: She is crawling through a log.
Anna: Um Felix, I think I'm stuck
Anna: I did it.
Students: Good job, Mom, but you missed one
DrJill: What?
DrJill: No!
DrJill: Anna missed an action!
DrJill: Which one?
DrJill: Can you remember?
DrJill: Let's find out.
Anna: I walked, climbed, rolled, crawled.
Anna: Oh wait, that is only four.
Anna: Oh, I forgot to cross the finish line between those two trees.
Max: He wants to the finish line.
DrJill: Try this game with your friends.
DrJill: Make a list of actions in English.
DrJill: Remember them and then do them.
DrJill: And come see us again on Let's Learn English with Anna.
